4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","incident-response",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","incident-response","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/02zo295tzj_7w.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/12wk4.kub2_30.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0og9v~0.wbgel.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0c3rgjc-0fe3r.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0iywei4pzeiss.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/10_9opwzz0v93.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable operations"}],["$","li","l-53-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"preserve logs and transaction references"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","h3","h3-56",{"className":"text-lg 2c:["$","$1","block-24",{"children":["$","ul","l-102",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-102-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"identify the affected proposal, DAO, treasury, or operator wallet"}],["$","li","l-102-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"capture all relevant transaction signatures and explorer links"}],["$","li","l-102-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"capture current account state"}],["$","li","l-102-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"stop new non-essential operator actions"}],["$","li","l-102-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"switch to fallback RPC if infrastructure instability is suspected"}],["$","li","l-102-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"verify whether a proposal is still before execute and therefore still vetoable if applicable"}],["$","li","l-102-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"document timeline, actors, and observed state"}]]}]}]

2f:["$","$1","block-27",{"children":["$","ul","l-119",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-119-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"confirm whether the proposal is already executed"}],["$","li","l-119-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"inspect the transaction in:"}],["$","li","l-119-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"[live-proof.md](docs/live-proof.md)-style format"}],["$","li","l-119-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"[test-wallet-live-proof-v3.generated.md](docs/test-wallet-live-proof-v3.generated.md) when the stricter additive path is relevant"}],["$","li","l-119-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"Solscan"}],["$","li","l-119-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"compare recipient, mint, and amount against the proposal intent"}],["$","li","l-119-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"confirm whether the action matches expected on-chain validation"}],["$","li","l-119-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"if a passed proposal is still timelocked and suspicious, consider the veto path before unlock"}]]}]}]
